/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/sfml-app.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/sfml-app.dir/home/mdimitris/Documents/Game_Dev/SFMLandC++/example/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/sfml-app.dir/home/mdimitris/Documents/Game_Dev/SFMLandC++/example/Game/game.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/sfml-app.dir/home/mdimitris/Documents/Game_Dev/SFMLandC++/example/Enemies/Enemies.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/sfml-app.dir/home/mdimitris/Documents/Game_Dev/SFMLandC++/example/Bullets/bullets.cpp.o" -o sfml-app  /usr/lib64/libsfml-graphics.so.2.6.2 /usr/lib64/libsfml-window.so.2.6.2 /usr/lib64/libsfml-system.so.2.6.2
